# Changelog

All notable changes to CodeSunGrab will be documented in this file.

---

## [3.0.1] - 2026-07-01

### 🚀 Added
- npm package support (Node.js wrapper)
- `codesungrab` & `sungrab` CLI commands
- Auto-install Python dependencies via npm postinstall
- `.env.example` template for easy setup

### 🔧 Changed
- Project structure: Python files moved to `src/`
- License: MIT → Proprietary (All Rights Reserved)
- `.npmignore` for cleaner npm publish

### 🐛 Fixed
- Email verification MIMEImage bug
- `fullName` error in banner display
- Session management improvements

---

## [3.0.0] - 2026-06-25

### 🚀 Added
- Appwrite Authentication (Signup/Login)
- Email verification with 6-digit code
- Beautiful HTML email template with logo
- Session management (local + remote)
- Argentina Victory Edition theme
- User profile banner (bullet style, no borders)
- npm-style loading bar with spinner
- Golden + White footer theme

### 🔧 Changed
- Complete UI redesign with ANSI colors
- Banner: gradient border boxes → clean bullet style
- Typing animation improvements

---

## [2.0.3] - 2026-06-15

### 🚀 Added
- Multi-platform download support
- Playlist download
- Batch download (sequential/parallel)
- TikTok watermark toggle
- Video + Subtitles download
- Download history
- Advanced settings (proxy, speed limit, workers)

### 🔧 Changed
- Argentina flag theme colors
- Compact menu design

---

## [2.0.0] - 2026-06-01

### 🚀 Added
- yt-dlp integration
- Platform detection
- URL validation
- Progress dashboard
- Audio/Video format selection

---

## [1.0.0] - 2026-05-15

### 🚀 Initial Release
- Basic YouTube downloader
- CLI interface
- Termux compatible
